Cool! 🙂 

Test case 3 is a bit of an addition, so tx + system combined and a gas limit tuned in a way that tx only is still under cap and tx + system is over. I am not so deeply in all/the test cases though that I can judge how useful that is or justified. Feel very free to skip, might be too incremental!
